title: Native Plugin for Antigravity
description: Develop a native plugin for antigravity functionality similar to the existing OpenClaw plugin.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Native Plugin for Antigravity (DEM-2026-0081)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to develop a native plugin enabling antigravity functionality, modeled after the existing OpenClaw plugin. It will enhance system capabilities within the infrastructure domain.

Business Value  
The plugin will improve performance and integration efficiency, providing a competitive advantage and supporting advanced operational requirements. It aligns with strategic goals to modernize and optimize infrastructure tools.

Risk Mitigation  
Medium-level risks include integration challenges and potential technical hurdles, which will be managed through phased development, thorough testing, and close collaboration with stakeholders. Ongoing monitoring will ensure timely issue resolution.
